name: Vedant Gour
tagline: Building scalable, performant, SEO-friendly web experiences with React, Next.js & TypeScript.
heroBlurb: Building accessible, performance-driven web applications with a strong focus on speed, usability, and AI-assisted efficiency.
about: I'm a Frontend Developer with over 3.5 years of experience building scalable and user-focused web applications using React.js, Next.js, and TypeScript. In my current role, I work on developing performant and maintainable applications with a strong focus on user experience.

I enjoy creating clean, accessible interfaces and improving application performance through reusable components and thoughtful frontend architecture. I have experience working with REST APIs, GraphQL, and React Query, and I'm also expanding my knowledge in backend technologies like Node.js, Express, and MongoDB.
I believe in continuous learning and enjoy exploring modern tools and workflows, including AI-assisted development, to improve productivity and code quality.
